prompt: Create a high-quality vertical portrait photo of a cute young adult anime-style cosplayer dressed as a Pikachu-inspired character, seated on an elegant vintage pink tufted loveseat in a bright pastel European studio. The subject is a blonde young adult female cosplayer with long wavy twin-tails, soft bangs, large expressive eyes, smooth fair skin, and a gentle smile, looking directly at the camera while holding both hands up to adjust a yellow headband with two upright Pikachu-like ears with black tips. Outfit: a glossy fitted yellow strapless mini-dress with black trim along the sweetheart neckline, a visible front zipper, black side panels, and one black lightning-bolt emblem on the right waist; matching long yellow arm sleeves with black edging; a simple black choker; thigh-high yellow stockings; and black platform Mary Jane heels with ankle straps. Pose: seated upright with knees together and legs extended toward the camera, feet close together, shoulders relaxed, playful and charming but tasteful. Environment: ornate carved wooden loveseat with dusty-rose velvet upholstery and button tufting, pale blue paneled wall with white decorative molding, partial ornate mirror frame on the right, white fireplace mantel on the left, and a vase of soft pink flowers in the background. Lighting and style: realistic fashion cosplay photography, soft diffused natural light, pastel color palette, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on face and costume, flattering skin tones, vertical full-body composition, 85mm lens look, high detail, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands or limbs. Use bright yellow and black as the dominant costume colors, with dusty pink upholstery and a pale blue background.
